title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: Location permission popup appears in Find My Device after declining location sharing during onboarding; tapping Cancel returns to Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During onboarding, when the Location Sharing dialogue appears, tap "Don't Allow".
3. Complete the remaining onboarding steps to reach the Home screen.
4. Navigate to App Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
5. Observe the permission popup that appears.
expected: The user remains on the Find My Device screen within the app, or the permission request is dismissed without navigating away.
